overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing first-person exploration of a dystopian urban environment at dusk. The player walks beneath elevated highways through concrete underpasses, encounters an NPC, then transitions to driving on a neon-lit highway through the futuristic city.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway underpass with waterfront walkway

events.description: character in red outfit appears walking along the waterfront railing
character in red climbs over railing and jumps off into the water below

agents.ego_description: walking steadily beneath the elevated highway infrastructure, observing the surrounding concrete pillars and distant skyscrapers

notable_agents.action: character in red walking along the railing and looking over the water before jumping off

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure casting shadows overhead
large cylindrical support column for the overhead highway
tall glass and steel tower with illuminated windows rising in the distance
red-brick industrial structure with neon lighting accents
metal fence running along the water's edge
scattered trash and construction debris along the walkway

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath massive elevated highway overpasses at dusk, with concrete pillars lining the path and a futuristic skyline visible ahead. A character in red clothing walks along the waterfront railing before jumping into the water below, while the camera continues forward through the industrial underpass area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with digital advertising

events.description: large illuminated digital billboard displaying advertisements comes into view on the right wall
passing the COLA storefront with bright illuminated signage

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered corridor beneath the highway, passing under utility pipes and cables

entered.detail: smooth concrete wall of the covered passageway
bundles of cables and pipes running along the ceiling
illuminated advertisement screen showing fashion imagery
retro-style cola advertisement sign above a storefront entrance

segments.scene_description: Moving through a narrow covered walkway beneath the highway infrastructure, with concrete walls and overhead utility pipes. A large digital billboard illuminates the right side with advertisements, followed by a COLA storefront entrance as the corridor opens ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air parking garage with neon city views

events.description: exiting the covered corridor into the open parking garage with view of the city skyline
entering the vehicle and transitioning from walking to driving mode

agents.ego_description: walking through the parking garage gate and approaching the abandoned vehicle to enter it

entered.detail: metal mesh security gate marking the entrance to the parking area
derelict car parked in the open garage space
panoramic view of illuminated skyscrapers with colorful neon signage
low concrete walls and metal fencing along the parking perimeter

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into an open-air parking garage with a stunning view of the neon-lit city skyline. The camera passes through a security gate and approaches an abandoned vehicle, then transitions to a driving perspective as the player enters the car.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered multi-lane highway tunnel with red neon lighting

events.description: accelerating onto the highway and entering the covered tunnel section with red neon lights
merging with moderate traffic flow including a yellow taxi and multiple sedans

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed through the neon-lit highway tunnel, navigating between other vehicles and following the curved road

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving ahead in the same lane maintaining steady speed
black sedan overtaking on the left side in the adjacent lane

entered.detail: enclosed concrete tunnel with multiple lanes and overhead openings
continuous red neon light strips running along the tunnel ceiling
structural beams and bridge sections visible through ceiling openings

segments.scene_description: Driving at high speed through a covered highway tunnel illuminated by striking red neon strip lights overhead. The road curves gently through the concrete structure with moderate traffic including a yellow taxi ahead and other vehicles overtaking, while the enclosed walls create a sense of speed and motion.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person progression from a gritty industrial underpass into a high-speed drive through a neon-lit futuristic city. It begins beneath massive elevated highway overpasses at dusk, passing a character in red who leaps from a waterfront railing into the water. As the camera moves forward, the environment tightens into a narrow covered walkway lined with utility pipes and a glowing digital billboard before opening up at a COLA storefront. The scene then emerges into an open-air parking garage overlooking a stunning neon skyline, where the camera passes a security gate and enters an abandoned vehicle. Finally, the perspective shifts to a high-speed drive through a covered highway tunnel, curving past a yellow taxi under the glow of striking red neon strip lights.
